policy_text: Meals under $50 are reimbursable. Alcohol is not reimbursable. Group meals are allowed.
known_issues: threshold boundary for $50 unclear|group meal alcohol itemization gap

policy_text: Requests must be submitted within 7 days. Late submissions may be considered.
known_issues: late submission criteria missing|7 day boundary unclear

policy_text: Only full-time students are eligible. Exceptions may apply.
Employees may work remotely when appropriate. Managers must approve remote work requests.
Travel expenses over $500 require approval. Travel expenses are generally reimbursable.
Contractors are not eligible for training funds. All team members may request training funds.
known_issues: possible contradiction contractor vs all team members

policy_text: Receipts should be submitted soon after purchase. Reimbursement is available for reasonable business expenses.
Students below 12 credits are not eligible. Part-time students may receive benefits with approval.
known_issues: possible contradiction part-time eligibility|approval criteria missing

policy_text: Equipment purchases up to $200 are covered. Equipment purchases above $200 require manager approval.
Employees can use company vehicles. Employees must not use company vehicles for personal travel.
known_issues: personal travel exception or scope clarification needed

policy_text: Refund requests are reviewed case-by-case. Customers must provide documentation.
Meals under $30 are covered. Meals over $30 are not covered. Meals for client events may be covered.
known_issues: client event exception missing approval criteria|$30 boundary unclear
